<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Michaela-Ann Mueller | Environmental Science Portfolio</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Lora:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;1,400&family=DM+Sans:opsz,wght@9..40,300;9..40,400;9..40,500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
* { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }
html { scroll-behavior:smooth; }
:root {
  --sage:#4e7a5a;
  --sage-l:#7aaa87;
  --sage-pale:#eaf2ec;
  --cream:#f7f4ef;
  --dark:#1c2320;
  --mid:#4a5a4e;
  --muted:#7a8c7e;
  --border:rgba(78,122,90,0.16);
  --earth:#8b6f4e;
}
body { font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif; background:var(--cream); color:var(--dark); line-height:1.7; }

/* NAV */
nav {
  position:fixed; top:0; left:0; right:0; z-index:200;
  background:rgba(247,244,239,0.94); backdrop-filter:blur(12px);
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
  display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;
  padding:0 5vw; height:58px;
}
.nav-name { font-family:'Lora',serif; font-size:0.95rem; font-weight:600; color:var(--sage); letter-spacing:0.01em; text-decoration:none; }
.nav-links { display:flex; gap:2rem; list-style:none; }
.nav-links a { text-decoration:none; font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:500; color:var(--mid); letter-spacing:0.07em; text-transform:uppercase; transition:color 0.2s; }
.nav-links a:hover { color:var(--sage); }
.hamburger { display:none; flex-direction:column; gap:5px; cursor:pointer; background:none; border:none; padding:4px; }
.hamburger span { display:block; width:22px; height:1.5px; background:var(--mid); transition:all 0.3s; }
.mobile-menu { display:none; position:fixed; top:58px; left:0; right:0; background:var(--cream); border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); padding:1.5rem 5vw; z-index:199; }
.mobile-menu.open { display:block; }
.mobile-menu a { display:block; padding:0.65rem 0; font-size:0.9rem; font-weight:500; color:var(--mid); text-decoration:none; border-bottom:1px solid var(--border); letter-spacing:0.05em; text-transform:uppercase; }
.mobile-menu a:last-child { border-bottom:none; }

/* HERO */
.hero {
  min-height:100vh; padding:80px 5vw 5rem;
  display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:5vw; align-items:center;
  position:relative; overflow:hidden;
}
.hero::after {
  content:''; position:absolute; top:0; right:0; bottom:0; width:50%;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg, transparent 0%, rgba(138,170,143,0.07) 100%);
  pointer-events:none;
}
.hero-eyebrow {
  font-size:0.75rem; letter-spacing:0.14em; text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--sage); font-weight:500; margin-bottom:1.1rem;
  display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.7rem;
}
.hero-eyebrow::before { content:''; display:block; width:28px; height:1px; background:var(--sage-l); }
h1 { font-family:'Lora',serif; font-size:clamp(2.2rem,4vw,3.6rem); font-weight:600; line-height:1.15; margin-bottom:1.3rem; }
h1 em { font-style:italic; color:var(--sage); }
.hero-bio { font-size:1rem; color:var(--mid); max-width:460px; margin-bottom:1.8rem; line-height:1.8; }
.hero-tags { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.45rem; margin-bottom:2rem; }
.tag { font-size:0.73rem; padding:0.28rem 0.8rem; border-radius:99px; border:1px solid var(--sage-l); color:var(--sage); font-weight:500; background:rgba(78,122,90,0.06); }
.hero-ctas { display:flex; gap:0.8rem; flex-wrap:wrap; }
.btn { display:inline-block; padding:0.6rem 1.3rem; border-radius:5px; font-size:0.84rem; font-weight:500; text-decoration:none; transition:all 0.2s; letter-spacing:0.02em; }
.btn-primary { background:var(--sage); color:white; border:1.5px solid var(--sage); }
.btn-primary:hover { background:#3d6349; border-color:#3d6349; }
.btn-outline { background:transparent; color:var(--sage); border:1.5px solid var(--sage-l); }
.btn-outline:hover { background:var(--sage-pale); }

/* PHOTO */
.hero-photo { display:flex; justify-content:center; position:relative; }
.photo-wrap { position:relative; width:min(320px,36vw); }
.photo-wrap::before {
  content:''; position:absolute;
  top:16px; left:16px; right:-16px; bottom:-16px;
  border:1.5px solid var(--sage-l); border-radius:4px; z-index:0;
}
.photo-wrap img { width:100%; aspect-ratio:3/4; object-fit:cover; object-position:center top; border-radius:4px; position:relative; z-index:1; display:block; }
.photo-badge {
  position:absolute; bottom:-12px; left:-12px; z-index:2;
  background:var(--sage); color:white;
  font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.07em; text-transform:uppercase;
  padding:0.45rem 0.85rem; border-radius:3px;
}

/* SECTIONS */
section { padding:5.5rem 5vw; }
section:nth-child(even) { background:white; }
.section-label {
  font-size:0.72rem; letter-spacing:0.14em; text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--sage-l); font-weight:500; margin-bottom:0.6rem;
  display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.6rem;
}
.section-label::after { content:''; flex:1; height:1px; background:var(--border); }
h2 { font-family:'Lora',serif; font-size:clamp(1.7rem,3vw,2.4rem); font-weight:600; margin-bottom:0.5rem; line-height:1.2; }
.section-intro { color:var(--mid); max-width:580px; margin-bottom:3rem; font-size:0.97rem; }

/* PROJECT CARDS */
.cards { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(300px,1fr)); gap:1.5rem; }
.card {
  background:var(--cream); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:8px;
  padding:1.5rem; transition:transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
  display:flex; flex-direction:column;
}
section:nth-child(even) .card { background:var(--sage-pale); }
.card:hover { transform:translateY(-3px); box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(78,122,90,0.1); }
.card-tag { font-size:0.68rem; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.09em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--sage); margin-bottom:0.7rem; }
.card h3 { font-family:'Lora',serif; font-size:1.05rem; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:0.6rem; line-height:1.35; }
.card p { font-size:0.88rem; color:var(--mid); line-height:1.7; flex:1; margin-bottom:1.1rem; }
.card-links { display:flex; gap:0.6rem; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-top:auto; }
.card-link {
  font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:500; color:var(--sage); text-decoration:none;
  border:1px solid var(--sage-l); border-radius:4px; padding:0.28rem 0.7rem;
  transition:all 0.2s; letter-spacing:0.02em;
}
.card-link:hover { background:var(--sage); color:white; border-color:var(--sage); }

/* SKILLS */
.skills-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(220px,1fr)); gap:1.2rem; }
.skill-block { background:var(--sage-pale); border-radius:8px; padding:1.3rem 1.4rem; border:1px solid var(--border); }
.skill-block h4 { font-size:0.78rem; letter-spacing:0.09em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--sage); font-weight:500; margin-bottom:0.7rem; }
.skill-block ul { list-style:none; }
.skill-block li { font-size:0.88rem; color:var(--mid); padding:0.22rem 0; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(78,122,90,0.1); }
.skill-block li:last-child { border-bottom:none; }

/* RESUME */
.resume-section { text-align:center; }
.resume-section .section-label { justify-content:center; }
.resume-section .section-label::after, .resume-section .section-label::before { content:''; flex:1; height:1px; background:var(--border); }
.resume-box {
  max-width:500px; margin:0 auto; padding:3rem;
  border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:8px; background:white;
}
.resume-box p { color:var(--mid); margin-bottom:1.5rem; font-size:0.95rem; }

/* FOOTER */
footer {
  background:var(--dark); color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
  padding:3rem 5vw; text-align:center;
}
footer a { color:var(--sage-l); text-decoration:none; }
footer a:hover { color:white; }
.footer-name { font-family:'Lora',serif; color:white; font-size:1.1rem; margin-bottom:0.5rem; }
.footer-links { display:flex; gap:2rem; justify-content:center; margin:1.2rem 0; font-size:0.88rem; }
.footer-copy { font-size:0.78rem; margin-top:1.5rem; opacity:0.5; }

/* RESPONSIVE */
@media(max-width:768px) {
  .hero { grid-template-columns:1fr; padding-top:90px; text-align:center; }
  .hero-photo { order:-1; }
  .photo-wrap { width:min(220px,55vw); }
  .hero-eyebrow { justify-content:center; }
  .hero-tags { justify-content:center; }
  .hero-ctas { justify-content:center; }
  .hero-bio { margin:0 auto 1.8rem; }
  .nav-links { display:none; }
  .hamburger { display:flex; }
}

/* FADE IN */
.fade-in { opacity:0; transform:translateY(18px); transition:opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease; }
.fade-in.visible { opacity:1; transform:none; }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav>
  <a class="nav-name" href="#home">Michaela-Ann Mueller</a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#gis">GIS</a></li>
    <li><a href="#research">Research</a></li>
    <li><a href="#writing">Writing</a></li>
    <li><a href="#skills">Skills</a></li>
    <li><a href="#resume">Resume</a></li>
  </ul>
  <button class="hamburger" onclick="toggleMenu()" aria-label="Menu">
    <span></span><span></span><span></span>
  </button>
</nav>

<div class="mobile-menu" id="mobileMenu">
  <a href="#about" onclick="closeMenu()">About</a>
  <a href="#gis" onclick="closeMenu()">GIS Projects</a>
  <a href="#research" onclick="closeMenu()">Research</a>
  <a href="#writing" onclick="closeMenu()">Academic Writing</a>
  <a href="#skills" onclick="closeMenu()">Skills</a>
  <a href="#resume" onclick="closeMenu()">Resume</a>
</div>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero" id="home">
  <div class="hero-text fade-in">
    <div class="hero-eyebrow">Environmental Science · Knox College '26</div>
    <h1>Spatial thinker.<br><em>Field researcher.</em><br>Future consultant.</h1>
    <p class="hero-bio">I study how landscapes work — and how they break. My work sits at the intersection of GIS mapping, hands-on field science, and environmental data analysis, with a goal of bringing that skill set into geospatial and environmental consulting.</p>
    <div class="hero-tags">
      <span class="tag">ArcGIS Pro</span>
      <span class="tag">GPS Field Collection</span>
      <span class="tag">Stormwater Research</span>
      <span class="tag">Spatial Analysis</span>
      <span class="tag">Technical Writing</span>
      <span class="tag">Overland Park, KS</span>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-ctas">
      <a href="#research" class="btn btn-primary">View my work</a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/michaela-ann-mueller-614a6a274" class="btn btn-outline" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
      <a href="mailto:mmueller0531@gmail.com" class="btn btn-outline">Contact</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-photo fade-in" style="animation-delay:0.15s">
    <div class="photo-wrap">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Michaela-Ann Mueller">
      <div class="photo-badge">Knox College · GPA 3.60</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section id="about">
  <div class="section-label">About me</div>
  <h2>Who I am</h2>
  <p class="section-intro">A little more than the resume version.</p>
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:3rem;max-width:860px;" class="fade-in">
    <div>
      <p style="color:var(--mid);line-height:1.85;font-size:0.97rem;">I grew up in Overland Park, Kansas, which gave me an early appreciation for the tension between suburban development and the natural systems underneath it. That tension is what pulled me toward environmental science — and specifically toward the spatial side of it. I wanted tools that could actually show where and how landscapes are changing.</p>
      <br>
      <p style="color:var(--mid);line-height:1.85;font-size:0.97rem;">At Knox College, I've built skills across GIS mapping, field data collection, and environmental research. My senior thesis on rain garden soil health is the project I'm most proud of — it's the first time everything came together: designing the study, collecting the data in the field, running the analysis, and writing it up.</p>
    </div>
    <div>
      <p style="color:var(--mid);line-height:1.85;font-size:0.97rem;">Outside the lab, I've been involved in collaborative research, orientation leadership, and even served as a student representative on Knox's CFO search committee — which gave me a rare window into how institutions make high-stakes decisions.</p>
      <br>
      <p style="color:var(--mid);line-height:1.85;font-size:0.97rem;">I'm drawn to work where environmental data informs real decisions — whether that's a utility company understanding their infrastructure footprint, or a city planning how to manage stormwater. I'm graduating in June 2026 and actively looking for GIS and environmental consulting opportunities.</p>
      <br>
      <div class="hero-tags" style="margin-bottom:0;">
        <span class="tag">Dean's List · 7 terms</span>
        <span class="tag">Knox Trustees' Scholarship</span>
        <span class="tag">Graduating June 2026</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- GIS -->
<section id="gis">
  <div class="section-label">GIS projects</div>
  <h2>Spatial analysis</h2>
  <p class="section-intro">Applied mapping and analysis using ArcGIS Pro and ArcGIS Online.</p>
  <div class="cards">
    <div class="card fade-in">
      <div class="card-tag">ArcGIS Pro · StoryMaps · Conservation</div>
      <h3>Habitat Protection in California</h3>
      <p>Analyzed the overlap between urban development, protected lands, and vulnerable habitats across California to identify areas at high risk for biodiversity loss. Used buffer analysis and spatial overlays to assess protection gaps by land access type.</p>
      <div class="card-links">
        <a href="https://storymaps.arcgis.com/stories/7133dd635d7046b4a0bcca847bd3b451" class="card-link" target="_blank">Story Map</a>
        <a href="Habitat_Protection_in_California.pdf" class="card-link">Full Report</a>
        <a href="Sensitive_Habitats_GIS.pdf" class="card-link">Map Output</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card fade-in">
      <div class="card-tag">ArcGIS Online · Environmental Justice · Demographic Mapping</div>
      <h3>Defining Food Deserts — Galesburg & Manhattan</h3>
      <p>Mapped spatial access to nutritious food across rural and urban contexts, using poverty data, walk-time buffers, and grocery store locations. Compared Galesburg, IL and Manhattan, NY to visualize disparities in food access and link findings to public health equity.</p>
      <div class="card-links">
        <a href="https://storymaps.arcgis.com/stories/63f8962a973f473f84e36557c51d30a4" class="card-link" target="_blank">Story Map</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- RESEARCH -->
<section id="research">
  <div class="section-label">Field & research projects</div>
  <h2>Research & field work</h2>
  <p class="section-intro">Collaborative and independent projects applying field methods, lab analysis, and scientific communication.</p>
  <div class="cards">
    <div class="card fade-in">
      <div class="card-tag">Senior Thesis · In Progress · GPS · Soil Sampling</div>
      <h3>Rain Garden Soil Health Assessment</h3>
      <p>Assessing the ability of rain gardens to improve soil health and ecosystem function across campus land-use types. Field methods include GPS-located soil coring, infiltration testing, LOI, and NPK analysis. Comparative analysis using ANOVA and GIS mapping. Final report coming June 2026.</p>
      <div class="card-links">
        <span class="card-link" style="opacity:0.55;cursor:default;">In progress</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card fade-in">
      <div class="card-tag">Collaborative · Stormwater · Native Plants</div>
      <h3>Biophilic & Resilient Design Research</h3>
      <p>Co-designed a 200 sq ft rain garden capturing ~360 gallons of runoff per 1-inch rainfall event, planted with 11 native species. Collaborated with 9 peers and faculty, produced a 12-page public research website, and presented a Living Building Challenge-inspired learning center to potential investors.</p>
      <div class="card-links">
        <a href="https://biophilicandresilient.knoxabolitionlab.org/" class="card-link" target="_blank">Research Website</a>
        <a href="Biophilic_Resilient_Presentation.pdf" class="card-link">Presentation</a>
        <a href="Learning_Center_Rendering.pdf" class="card-link">Rendering</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card fade-in">
      <div class="card-tag">Soil Science · Carbon · Policy</div>
      <h3>Soil Carbon Sequestration — Literature Review</h3>
      <p>In-depth 9-page review of microbial, physical, and policy factors influencing carbon storage in agricultural soils. Synthesized recent research to evaluate soil health, microbial efficiency, and economic barriers to large-scale implementation.</p>
      <div class="card-links">
        <a href="Soil_Carbon_Sequestration.pdf" class="card-link">Full Paper</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card fade-in">
      <div class="card-tag">Sustainability · Campus Policy</div>
      <h3>Reducing Single-Use Plastics at Knox College</h3>
      <p>Team proposal for campus-wide plastic reduction strategies targeting the C-Store and residence halls. Conducted cost-benefit analysis of alternatives and projected a reduction of ~1,010 lbs of plastic annually. Delivered findings to stakeholders via written report and presentation.</p>
      <div class="card-links">
        <a href="Reduce_Plastic_Use_Knox.pdf" class="card-link">Written Report</a>
        <a href="Reduce_Plastic_Use_Knox_Slides.pdf" class="card-link">Slides</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card fade-in">
      <div class="card-tag">Biology · Research Methods · BIO 210</div>
      <h3>Stentor Research — Behavior & Morphology</h3>
      <p>Collaborated with a partner to investigate Stentor spp. behavior and morphology through observation and experimental analysis. Designed and executed research methodology, created a visual poster, and produced a written report documenting methods, results, and conclusions.</p>
      <div class="card-links">
        <a href="Stentor_Poster.pdf" class="card-link">Poster</a>
        <a href="Stentor_Report.pdf" class="card-link">Written Report</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- WRITING -->
<section id="writing">
  <div class="section-label">Academic writing</div>
  <h2>Research papers</h2>
  <p class="section-intro">Long-form scientific writing demonstrating research synthesis, technical communication, and interdisciplinary analysis.</p>
  <div class="cards">
    <div class="card fade-in">
      <div class="card-tag">Conservation Biology · Wetland Ecology · Restoration</div>
      <h3>Wetland Loss in the Mississippi River Delta</h3>
      <p>Examines anthropogenic and climate drivers of wetland loss in coastal Louisiana, evaluating current sediment diversion restoration strategies. Proposes a function-centered adaptive management framework — arguing that restoration success should be measured by ecological metrics, not just land area gained.</p>
      <div class="card-links">
        <a href="Wetland_Loss_in_the_Mississippi_River_Delta.pdf" class="card-link">Presentation</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card fade-in">
      <div class="card-tag">Hydrology · Urban Flooding · Comparative Analysis</div>
      <h3>Urban Flooding: Houston, TX vs. Lahore, Pakistan</h3>
      <p>Compares how urbanization, climate drivers, and governance strategies shape flood risk and mitigation in two rapidly growing cities. Analyzes how differences in impervious surface cover, drainage infrastructure, and planning approaches produce vastly different hydrologic outcomes and community impacts.</p>
      <div class="card-links">
        <span class="card-link" style="opacity:0.55;cursor:default;">Paper — coming soon</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SKILLS -->
<section id="skills">
  <div class="section-label">Technical skills</div>
  <h2>What I work with</h2>
  <p class="section-intro">Built through coursework, independent research, and hands-on field work.</p>
  <div class="skills-grid fade-in">
    <div class="skill-block">
      <h4>GIS & Mapping</h4>
      <ul>
        <li>ArcGIS Pro</li>
        <li>ArcGIS Online</li>
        <li>StoryMaps</li>
        <li>Spatial joins & buffer analysis</li>
        <li>Land-use & demographic mapping</li>
        <li>Geocoding & aerial imagery</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-block">
      <h4>Field & Lab</h4>
      <ul>
        <li>GPS field data collection</li>
        <li>Soil coring & site assessment</li>
        <li>Infiltration testing</li>
        <li>Loss-on-ignition (LOI)</li>
        <li>NPK nutrient analysis</li>
        <li>Field navigation & data QA</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-block">
      <h4>Data & Analysis</h4>
      <ul>
        <li>Excel data analysis</li>
        <li>ANOVA statistical testing</li>
        <li>Dataset management</li>
        <li>Metadata documentation</li>
        <li>Environmental data interpretation</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-block">
      <h4>Communication</h4>
      <ul>
        <li>Technical report writing</li>
        <li>Scientific literature review</li>
        <li>Stakeholder presentations</li>
        <li>Research website design</li>
        <li>Tutoring & instruction</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- RESUME -->
<section id="resume" style="background:white;">
  <div class="section-label" style="justify-content:center;">Resume</div>
  <div class="resume-box fade-in">
    <h2 style="margin-bottom:0.8rem;">Download my resume</h2>
    <p>Environmental Science · GIS · Field Research · Consulting<br>Knox College, graduating June 2026</p>
    <a href="Mueller_Resume.pdf" class="btn btn-primary" download>Download PDF</a>
    <br><br>
    <p style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--muted);">For inquiries: <a href="mailto:mmueller0531@gmail.com" style="color:var(--sage);">mmueller0531@gmail.com</a></p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-name">Michaela-Ann Mueller</div>
  <div style="font-size:0.85rem;">Environmental Science · Knox College · Class of 2026</div>
  <div class="footer-links">
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/michaela-ann-mueller-614a6a274" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
    <a href="mailto:mmueller0531@gmail.com">Email</a>
    <a href="https://github.com/mmmueller04" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
  </div>
  <div class="footer-copy">© 2026 Michaela-Ann Mueller</div>
</footer>

<script>
function toggleMenu() {
  document.getElementById('mobileMenu').classList.toggle('open');
}
function closeMenu() {
  document.getElementById('mobileMenu').classList.remove('open');
}

// Fade in on scroll
const obs = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
  entries.forEach(e => { if(e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('visible'); } });
}, { threshold: 0.1 });
document.querySelectorAll('.fade-in').forEach(el => obs.observe(el));
</script>
</body>
</html>
